abilities.name: Expert Climber
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may ignore vertical distance while resolving the Walk or Charge action.

abilities.name: Resilient
abilities.text: Attacks targeting this model reduce raises they receive by 1 (to a minimum of 0).

abilities.name: Scout Ahead
abilities.text: After deployment zones are chosen, choose an enemy non-master model without From Shadow. The chosen model deploys now rather than during deployment.

actions.name: Sharp Claws
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This attack has a raise value of 3.

triggers.name: Siphon Life
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage and this model heals 1.

actions.name: Hunt by Moonlight
actions.costs_and_restrictions: While this model is on terrain of Ht 2 or greater, this action may be treated as a (magic).

triggers.name: Puncture
triggers.text: When resolving, this attack receives one additional raise.

triggers.name: Circle the Hollow
triggers.text: Once per activation. Place this model in base contact with a Lamp marker within 6" of this model.

triggers.name: Vantage Point
triggers.text: Enemy only. Make a Scheme marker anywhere in the area between this model and the target.

actions.name: Lost in the Woods
actions.effects: Make either a Scheme or Lamp marker anywhere within range.
